summary: Full e2e testing of Locke & Ladder Proposal Microsite V4. All 12 sections render, backend APIs pass 100%, form submission works, visualizer/lightbox/gallery all functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Lightbox element lacks data-testid='evidence-lightbox'; found via [role='dialog'] only. Low priority since it opens correctly.
Subtitle text 'Worth preserving well — for the generations...' has very low contrast on the light/white gradient overlay at 390px; text is nearly invisible in some positions.

issues: Subtitle paragraph text low contrast on light background overlay — text almost invisible at bottom of hero

action_items: Add data-testid='evidence-lightbox' to the lightbox root element in EvidenceWall.jsx for testability
Consider improving hero subtitle text contrast on mobile (390px) — text color may need slight darkening or bg overlay adjustment
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger used before assignment (line 103) — logger is defined at line 144 but used in the route handler at line 103. Works at runtime because logging.getLogger is called lazily but is a code quality issue.
BravaGallery: AnimatePresence hero image uses data-testid on motion.img which remounts on change — consistent but worth noting for animation timing in tests

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all critical functionality working; 2 minor issues

seed_data_creation: Created test submissions: TEST_BoardMember (board@test.com), TEST_Persistence (persist@test.com) via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 fresh build. All 12 sections render correctly (hero/diagnosis/evidence/cedar-brava/gallery/visualizer/aspen/system/craftsmanship/team/giveback/closing). Backend 8/8 pass. Lightbox opens via [role='dialog']. Visualizer has 3 slider instances with drag handles. Form POSTs to /api/proposal/interest and shows 'Received — thank you'. No emoji in text. Minor: lightbox missing data-testid, hero subtitle low contrast on mobile.
rca_of_issues: 1. Lightbox data-testid: EvidenceWall lightbox overlay likely renders without data-testid on root. Add data-testid='evidence-lightbox' to the lightbox container div. 2. Hero mobile contrast: background paper color and thin font weight combine at small sizes to reduce readability.
